3231000.name: Casino Box - Suitera DLC
3231000.description:
Welcome to Casino Box, and it's first DLC, Suitera!

We built Suitera from the ground up, to be a new Casino card game.

Face cards are worth 10 points, Ace 1 point and other cards face value. Each suit has a bonus against another suit. When a two of hearts versus a 2 of Spades, the hearts card gets a plus 2 bonus making it a 4 of hearts, beating the two of spades.

Using that simple formula the goal of Suitera is to win all three battles by having the higher number in each of the three battle lanes.

You buy into a game for a dollar, and then after seeing your middle lane card you can choose to increase the bet. All three battles commence from there, as you are shown the results.

It may sound difficult at first but like many casino games, it's a game of chance with some calculated risk.

Purchasing Suitera will support future development of new games for Casino Box, which is a free product with no ads.
